experiment: Body sign test on tab:dark_subspace gate-passing settings
scope: Backs the binomial sign-test arithmetic reported in results.tex paragraph 'Every validity-gate-passing setting shows residual above SAE-Recon...' and in appendix paragraph 'Binomial sign-test arithmetic.' under app:koc2_bootstrap. The denominator is the gate-passing rows of Table tab:dark_subspace (no daggers, no double-daggers).

relationship_to_cohort_bootstrap.note: This is a different test from the cohort-level sign test reported in cohort_bootstrap.json. The cohort sign test uses 5 inverting cohort rows (the 'directional sign-test cohort' enumerated in tab:koc2_bootstrap_per_row) with one-sided binomial p approx 0.03125. The body sign test below uses 7 rows from tab:dark_subspace as its denominator, with one-sided binomial p approx 0.008. The two denominators overlap but are not identical, as flagged in the appendix paragraph after tab:koc2_bootstrap_per_row.

diagnostic_context_rows_excluded.reason: recon cosine 0.767 below 0.85 permissive threshold; activates only 9 SAE features

script: Recomputable from scripts/dark_subspace/verify_claims.py and the per-setting source_jsons listed above. Some non-Pythia subgroup JSONs are GPU-pipeline outputs not bundled in this artefact and regenerate to the listed paths on rerun; the AUROC values cached in this file mirror those reported in tab:dark_subspace.
n_boot_unused: This is a binomial sign test. Bootstrap CIs are not used; the per-row paired bootstrap CIs live in tab:koc2_bootstrap_per_row backed by cohort_bootstrap.json.
